title: Vivo V70 FE confirmed to launched in India: Launch date, expected specs and all you need to know
snippet: The Vivo V70 FE will launch in India on April 2, 2026. Leaks suggest that the device could feature a 200MP camera, a MediaTek 7360 processor, and a large 7000mAh battery.

title: X down for thousands of users, global outage disrupts timeline and mobile app
snippet: Elon Musk's social media platform X is experiencing outages, affecting thousands of users. Downdetector reports over 30,000 complaints regarding the platform's functionality today.

title: Samsung reveals Galaxy A37, A57 India price: Check launch offers, specificiations and more
snippet: Samsung has finally revealed the pricing for its Galaxy A series lineup which was launched yesterday. The Galaxy A37 begins at a price of  ₹41,999 while the Galaxy A57 starts at  ₹56,999.

title: One Tech Tip: Heres how AI can (and cant) help you in your job hunt
snippet: One Tech Tip: Here's how AI can (and can't) help you in your job hunt

title: Meta to turn employees into ‘AI builders’, reorganize teams into smaller pods amid Reality Labs layoffs: Report
snippet: Meta is rebranding employees as AI builders and organising them into pods within its Reality Labs division, according to a new report. The pilot program is aimed at enhancing engineering productivity and product quality through cross-disciplinary work.

title: Apple to 'distill' Google's Gemini into smaller models to power localized iPhone AI features: Report
snippet: Apple's partnership with Google allows it to ‘distill’ Gemini model to create smaller models to run AI features on device on iPhones. Apple had earlier this year announced its partnership with Google to power Siri and run other AI features

title: Discord says technical issue resolved hours after users complained of downtime
snippet: Discord had reported an issue after 14,000 users faced issues in connecting on voice call. Many reported seeing the message ‘awaiting endpoint’, signaling a failure to establish voice communication

title: Gemini gets a major upgrade as Google adds 3-minute AI music generation: here's how it works
snippet: Gemini's new Lyria 3 Pro integration enables the creation of 3-minute music tracks with improved fidelity and customization. It supports diverse applications, from study music to jingles, while adhering to copyright policies with embedded SynthID watermarks for content verification.

US State Department launches new $250 million Pax Silica Fund to secure semiconductor supply chains
snippet: The United States Department of State launched a new USD 250 million Pax Silica Fund initiative, designed to reinforce the security and reliability of global semiconductor supply chains.

title: OpenAI's US ad pilot exceeds $100 million in annualised revenue in six weeks
snippet: OpenAI's ChatGPT ads pilot in the United States has crossed ​the $100 million annualised revenue mark ​within six weeks of launch, a company spokesperson ​said on Thursday, pointing to robust early demand for the AI startup's nascent advertising business.

title: Claude AI maker Anthropic considers IPO as soon as October
snippet: Anthropic PBC is considering going public as soon as in October, according to people familiar with the matter, as the artificial intelligence company races with rival OpenAI Inc. to hold an initial public offering.

title: Muted Q4 awaits IT large caps as clock ticks slow on AI gains
snippet: Forrestor expects tech services spending in the U.S to grow by 5.2% in 2026, and global tech services spending to grow at 4.6%, with the latent demand for AI-led services expected to fuel service providers’ revenue growth, Sharma highlighted.

title: Netflix raises subscription prices across all plans in US
snippet: Netflix, ​which has ​more than 325 million subscribers, had ⁠scrapped its cheapest ad-free plan, called basic, ​in 2023, leaving users with its ​more expensive premium and standard plans, as well as the standard plan with ads.

title: India’s tech hiring edge; Fashion funding heats up
snippet: Happy Friday! AI and lower-cost talent have given a hiring advantage to countries like India, Philippines and Brazil. This and more in today’s ETtech Morning Dispatch.

title: White House AI czar Sacks to step down, moves to advisory role
snippet: David Sacks was appointed to his role ‌in December 2024, but under US rules, special government employees are limited to 130 days ​of work ​in a 12-month ⁠period. The cap applies to days worked rather than the overall length of the appointment.

title: Judge stays Pentagon's labelling of Anthropic as 'supply chain risk'
snippet: A federal judge temporarily stopped the Department of Defense from calling Anthropic a security risk, allowing federal contracts to continue. title: Meta boosts Texas AI data centre investment to $10 billion
snippet: Meta said it will raise spending on its El Paso Texas AI data centre to $10 billion to reach one gigawatt by 2028. Big tech firms are racing to build AI infrastructure. title: Apple plans to open Siri to rival AI services: Bloomberg
snippet: Apple is developing tools to let chatbot apps installed via its App Store work with Siri and other ‌features under its Apple Intelligence platform, Bloomberg News reported.
